title: Compliance: python/meshtastic/address.py TOFU
description: Policy: 06-security.md §8.6. File: python/src/lichen/interface/meshtastic/address.py. Status: VIOLATION. AddressMapper.learn() silently overwrites existing peer pubkey (line 161) without TOFU key change detection. Spec requires: pin on first contact, reject subsequent changes. Fix: check _peers.get(iid) before overwrite, reject if different.
